findings.description: Page layout significantly altered; text originally overlaid on a background image is now placed above the image.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, title and subtitle text are overlaid on the top portion of a full-width background image. In the HTML, the text appears first, followed by the image below it.
The PDF contains a Duke Energy logo at the bottom center of the page, which is completely absent in the HTML rendering.

findings.description: Complex multi-column and collage layout completely lost.
findings.evidence: The PDF features a complex layout with side-by-side sections at the top and a structured collage of 14 partner logos at the bottom. The HTML flattens this entirely into a single, disorganized vertical column.

findings.description: Multiple logos are missing, cropped, or malformed.
findings.evidence: Several logos from the PDF collage (e.g., the large DEQ logo top left, Duke Energy logo) are missing. Others are improperly cropped or merged (e.g., Lake James/Lake Norman logos).

findings.description: Two-column layout collapsed into a single column.
findings.evidence: The PDF presents a form screenshot on the left and text/logos on the right. The HTML renders these sequentially in a single vertical column.
The text 'Photo of plant for ID' has a green highlight in the PDF, which is lost in the HTML, removing visual emphasis.
The PDF shows two large, distinct image collage blocks side-by-side. The HTML stacks them vertically one after the other.

findings.description: Image collage is malformed and partially cropped.
findings.evidence: The right-hand image block (red border) from the PDF is rendered poorly in the HTML, appearing severely cropped on the right side and losing its overall aspect ratio.
The PDF has contact information text in a left column and a poster image in a right column. The HTML stacks the text entirely above the image.
